notes: US-based global card network and issuer. Publishes the Data Security Operating Policy (DSOP) for merchants. Documents are restricted to merchants/acquirers under their American Express acceptance agreements.

match_nodes.description: American Express Data Security Operating Policy (DSOP)

data.official_name: American Express Data Security Operating Policy (DSOP)
data.notes: Merchant-restricted. American Express's data-security policy for merchants, aligned with PCI DSS with additional Amex-specific requirements.
